response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies relevant to the job description.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI agent development and various tech stacks
Strong background in software development with a focus on testable projects
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Lack of direct mention of experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL
Basic German language skills may not be sufficient for all interactions
